module.name: hal_usb_cdc
module.brief: USB CDC service support classes and helpers.

class.name: hal_usb_cdc_service
class.brief: Abstract CDC-ACM USB service base class.
class.details: This abstract class implements the common CDC-ACM service logic shared by higher-level wrappers such as serial-over-USB channels. The class provides endpoint setup, ownership metadata, class-request handling, and USB event dispatch. Derived classes only need to implement the actual bulk/interrupt data-path behavior.

field.name: connected
field.brief: Connection state as observed by the USB service logic.

field.name: control_line_state
field.brief: Current CDC control line state bitmap.

method.name: usbCdcServiceOnConfiguredI
method.details: Called with the system lock held after the CDC endpoints have been initialized and the service state marked connected.

method.name: usbCdcServiceOnDisconnectedI
method.brief: Derived hook after reset, unconfigure, or suspend.
method.details: Called with the system lock held after the CDC service has been marked disconnected.

method.name: usbCdcServiceOnSOFHookI
method.brief: Derived hook on each SOF notification.

method.name: usbCdcServiceOnDataTransmittedI
method.brief: Derived hook on bulk IN completion.

method.name: usbCdcServiceOnDataReceivedI
method.brief: Derived hook on bulk OUT completion.

method.name: usbCdcServiceOnInterruptTransmittedI
method.brief: Derived hook on interrupt IN completion.

method.name: usbCdcServiceOnControlLineState
method.brief: Derived hook after control line state changes.

function.name: usbCdcServiceStart
usbCdcServiceStop
usbCdcServiceGetLineCodingX
function.brief: Returns the current CDC line coding structure.
function.return: Pointer to the current line coding structure.

function.name: usbCdcServiceGetControlLineStateX
function.brief: Returns the current control line state bitmap.
function.return: The current control line state bitmap.

function.name: usbCdcServiceGetConfigX
function.return: The active CDC configuration or @p NULL.

function.name: usbCdcServiceIsConnectedX
function.brief: Returns the current logical connection state.

function.name: cdcsvc_set_default_linecoding
cdcsvc_endpoint_in_cb
cdcsvc_endpoint_out_cb
